columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: ClientIp
columns.description: The IP address of the device that was used when the activity was logged.

columns.name: CorrelationId
columns.description: A unique value used to associate related rows.

columns.name: CrmOrganizationUniqueName
columns.description: Unique name of the organization.

columns.name: EntityId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the entity.

columns.name: EntityName
columns.description: Name of the entity in the organization.

columns.name: Fields
columns.description: JSON of Key Value pair reflecting the values that were created or updated.

columns.name: InstanceUrl
columns.description: URL to the instance.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: ItemType
columns.description: The type of object that was accessed or modified. See the ItemType table for details on the types of objects.

columns.name: ItemUrl
columns.description: URL to the record emitting the log.

columns.name: Message
columns.description: Name of the message called in the Dynamics 365 SDK.

columns.name: Operation
columns.description: The name of the operation that the user is performing.

columns.name: OrganizationId
columns.description: The GUID for your organization's Office 365 tenant. This value will always be the same for your organization.

columns.name: OriginalObjectId
columns.description: The ObjectId for Dataverse operation or business activity.

columns.name: Query
columns.description: The query filter parameters used while executing the FetchXML.

columns.name: QueryResults
columns.description: One or multiple unique records returned by the Retrieve and Retrieve Multiple SDK message call.

columns.name: ResultStatus
columns.description: Indicates whether the action (specified in the Operation property) was successful or not.

columns.name: ServiceContextId
columns.description: The unique id associated with service context.

columns.name: ServiceContextIdType
columns.description: Application defined token to define context use.

columns.name: ServiceName
columns.description: Name of the Service generating the log.

columns.name: SourceRecordId
columns.description: Unique identifier of an audit record.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: SystemUserId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the user GUID in the organization.

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The date and time in (UTC) when the user performed the activity.

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: UserAgent
columns.description: The user agent.

columns.name: UserId
columns.description: The Dataverse user ID of the user who performed the action (specified in the Operation property) that resulted in the record being logged.

columns.name: UserKey
columns.description: An alternative ID for the user identified in the UserId property.

columns.name: UserType
columns.description: The type of user that performed the operation. See the UserType table in Office 365 management activity api schema documentation for details on the types of users.

columns.name: UserUpn
columns.description: The UPN (User Principal Name) of the user who performed the action (specified in the Operation property) that resulted in the record being logged.
